# Source Catalog - outcome-review

This catalog tracks the authoritative external sources used to keep this skill current and reusable.

| Source | What It Provides | Why It Is Valuable | In Use | Last Evaluated | Current Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [DORA Research](https://dora.dev/research/) | Outcome-aware delivery capability framing | Supports linking delivery behavior to real result review rather than process-only success | Yes | 2026-04-24 | Current | Supports post-ship interpretation discipline |
| [The SPACE of Developer Productivity](https://queue.acm.org/detail.cfm?id=3454124) | Balanced signal interpretation | Helps avoid overfitting decisions to one weak or distorted metric | Yes | 2026-04-24 | Current | Supports confidence and caveat framing |
| [Opportunity Solution Tree](https://www.producttalk.org/opportunity-solution-tree/) | Outcome-oriented product reasoning | Useful for tracing shipped work back to intended outcomes and opportunity decisions | Yes | 2026-04-24 | Current | Supports expected-versus-actual framing |

## Freshness Policy

- Default maximum age: 30 days.
- If Last Evaluated exceeds the threshold, set Current Status to Needs Review.
- If a source is no longer maintained or relevant, mark In Use as No and Current Status as Deprecated.
